## Recent Reflexion (last 2 sessions)
**S83** — Voltkin true-alpha + real animation, 5/5 (Full tier, Council R1+R2, user-approved batch, CHECK Triumvirate). P1 the 'white squares' were a DATA bug — a literal drawn picture of a transparency checkerboard, 0% real alpha; deterministic matte (measured tones, border-connected, nearest-bg unmix) needed no AI; when a verify probe fails, autopsy the failure before loosening. P2 probe the HARD case (walk cycle: motion+loop+in-place) — $0.50 converted the P3 bet into ground truth and the probe became the production asset; flatten transparent seeds onto the target bg; prompt in animation-principle vocabulary. P3 pick each clip's bg from the matte's failure modes (magenta for white decorations) + palette-justified despill; discovered wire prevPos==pos on the client mirror (S36 facing flip never worked in 1v1) → renderer-side velocity estimator fixed both; the 'wrong' live ATTACKING probe was the FSM correctly rejecting a target-less attack — a real bond severed under the new render proved render-only. P4 median plate caught static arc cores — morphological opening separated checker from arcs BY SHAPE; the first verify metric false-failed on the explosion flash (verification metrics are code too). P5 Grok CHECK FAIL cited nonexistent files — triage rejected 4/5 with evidence, the 5th became 12 lines of hardening, Gemini's unison note shipped as a 1-line win: a FAIL verdict is a list of claims, not a stop sign.
**S82** — user-queued full batch, 5/5 (Full tier, autonomous). P1 target-chase beats per-message cap (authority moved from message to tick). P2 param-injection beats world-field for host-only persistence (wire-safe BY CONSTRUCTION). P3 inward-only fog fuzz kept every exact-RGB probe valid by geometry; extract.pixels IS the screenshot. P4 room-code-as-pubkey-fingerprint killed the TOFU race; empirical e2e probe BEFORE dependent code. P5 archaeology before execution — a CARRIED banner claimed 'never executed'; code reads proved it shipped across 4 sessions.
